content.thinking:
The waybar config has `systemd.enable = true` on line 112. I need to add systemd service overrides. In home-manager, the way to do this is via `systemd.user.services.waybar` to override the unit that `programs.waybar` creates.

Let me add the overrides directly in the waybar.nix file.

content.text: Now I'll add the systemd service overrides. Since `programs.waybar` with `systemd.enable = true` creates a `waybar.service` user unit, I can override it via `systemd.user.services.waybar`.

content.text: All checks pass. Now let me commit and push.

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix waybar systemd service racing with Hyprland startup

The waybar user service could start before WAYLAND_DISPLAY was set,
causing 'cannot open display' failures. Add unit ordering dependencies
on graphical-session.target and restart-on-failure so waybar waits for
the compositor and recovers from transient startup errors.
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Fix waybar systemd service racing with Hyprland startup" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Adds `After=graphical-session.target` and `Wants=graphical-session.target` to the waybar systemd user service so it waits for WAYLAND_DISPLAY to be set before starting
- Adds `Restart=on-failure` with `RestartSec=2` so waybar recovers from transient startup failures

## Test plan
- [x] `nix flake check` passes
- [x] Pre-commit checks pass
- [ ] Verify waybar starts reliably after Hyprland login on affected hosts

Run: 20260319-0846-de19
EOF
)"

content.text:
PR created: https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/366

The fix adds `systemd.user.services.waybar` overrides in `home/waybar.nix` that:
- **`After` + `Wants` `graphical-session.target`** — ensures waybar waits until the compositor has set `WAYLAND_DISPLAY`
- **`Restart = "on-failure"` + `RestartSec = 2`** — auto-recovers if waybar still fails transiently

These merge with the unit that `programs.waybar` with `systemd.enable = true` already creates, so the existing service definition is preserved.

result:
PR created: https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/366

The fix adds `systemd.user.services.waybar` overrides in `home/waybar.nix` that:
- **`After` + `Wants` `graphical-session.target`** — ensures waybar waits until the compositor has set `WAYLAND_DISPLAY`
- **`Restart = "on-failure"` + `RestartSec = 2`** — auto-recovers if waybar still fails transiently

These merge with the unit that `programs.waybar` with `systemd.enable = true` already creates, so the existing service definition is preserved.
